74259.subject: 💰 OpenAI finally files for IPO
74259.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,777 (-0.3%) | **ETH** $1,677 (0.2%) | **SOL** $66 (0.2%)

* OpenAI [files for IPO](https://x.com/OpenAINewsroom/status/2064094175541461220?s=20) — Odds of [trading over $1.5T](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2064102863291261261?s=20) surge to 50% on Polymarket

* SpaceX to [close IPO books](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2064012004256321796?s=20) tomorrow at market close

* Claude Mythos is rumored to be [released as soon as this week](https://x.com/DecryptMedia/status/2064293082263105708?s=20)

* Morpho DeFi lending protocol [raises $175M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2064314337196421287?s=20) at a $2B valuation

* Humanity Protocol [gets exploited](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2064176186763203018?s=20) due to compromised employee laptop with losses [exceeding $30M](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2064208291723694459?s=20)

* Intel [surges 15%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2063972703288074587?s=20) on back of Google and Nvidia [deals](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2063969964223287645?s=20)

* Strategy shareholders [approve](https://x.com/tokens/status/2064014860917395598?s=20) twice a month STRC dividends

* Coinbase’s [USDC deployment](https://x.com/coinbase/status/2063973364117414207?s=20) on Hyperliquid goes live

* Top crypto protocols send joint letter to Congress urging for [developer protections](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2064278722220302342?s=20) in the Clarity Act

* [SBF formally applies](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2063986606021738727?s=20) for Presidential pardon

* AOL parent company [files for IPO](https://x.com/axios/status/2063958633138770174?s=20)

* Alibaba is designated as a [“Chinese Military Firm”](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2064023460863484251?s=20)

* [Ondo perps](https://x.com/tokens/status/2064004530224943160?s=20) goes live today

* TON community votes to change [token name to GRAM](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2064015157525721262?s=20)

* Citrini [research report](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2064120132780322837?s=20) shows HYPE buybacks have accounted for 50% of all token buybacks

* Binance stock trading surpasses [$400M in AUM](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2064258473672458496?s=20)

* Adam Weitsm

Fear and Greed is at
15
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC is near
$63K
this morning, bouncing slightly after touching $59,200 on Friday,
its lowest price since October 2024. The total market cap holds
around
$2.16T
as the market looks for a floor.

What happens during a crash tells you a lot. Family offices and
sovereign wealth funds are calling the dip a buying opportunity.
One ETH treasury firm made its biggest purchase of the year into
the selloff. MetaMask just launched infrastructure for AI agents
to trade DeFi autonomously. And Sam Bankman-Fried filed a pardon
petition.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Institutions Are Buying Bitcoin While Everyone Else Sells

Coinbase's head of institutional strategy told CNBC on June 8
that family offices and sovereign wealth funds are actively
buying Bitcoin's price decline. BTC touched $59,200 on June 6,
roughly 50% below its October 2025 peak.

"They loved it at $125,000 and they love it even more at
$65,000," he said.

What price target has Bernstein set for Bitcoin despite the
current decline?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/wJue-WepYGN9iQApgTpdKg~~/AAQRxRA~/K8CRLJ8fnXnYw7LsaCz4upf4xO7RzwBXsLnEWn5cAf4meNuOXKp7k3thHmhYNSDaqypPeypV9l4mSWa86ZsegE23gliq-Ojnykih7oFkSSbx3wXiABN42fII68oC85dSSP-jt5788pPH7rJ4JyI34tRZAuSQujvt9dRgskby3j0~ )
   Tokenized Real-World Assets Just Grew Almost Sixfold

The number of active tokenized re
